name: Flipkart
description: India's largest e-commerce marketplace for electronics, fashion, groceries, and lifestyle products with 400M+ registered users
pros: Largest product selection among Indian e-commerce platforms
Flipkart Plus loyalty program with free shipping and early access
Strong electronics and smartphone deals (Big Billion Days)
SuperCoins reward system across Flipkart ecosystem
cons: Product quality inconsistent from third-party sellers
Return process can be slow for certain categories
userComplaints: Fake reviews and inflated MRP before discounts are common
Delivery delays in tier-2 and tier-3 cities
Refund processing takes longer than promised
